plugins.name: slides
plugins.description: Create MARP slide decks and convert to PDF, HTML, PPTX, and Google Slides with visual validation

plugins.name: muck
plugins.description: Four tools for fighting AI slop: spot it, guard against it, clean it up, and learn your voice

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: AirDrop-style context handoff and interactive team coordination for Claude Code sessions in cmux

plugins.name: offload
plugins.description: Session memory persistence, prompt logging, and context analysis for Claude Code

plugins.name: ed
plugins.description: Edit or view a file in an adjacent cmux surface. /ed:edit opens the editor + a hot-reload viewer pane when configured for the file type; /ed:view opens a single viewer pane with editor-read-only fallback. Per-extension config at ~/.config/ed/config.toml.
